aiNewsletter.title: AI Newsletter
aiNewsletter.subtitle: Multi-topic AI-powered newsletter generation engine
aiNewsletter.description: The AI Newsletter is a sophisticated platform that automatically generates multiple specialized newsletters across diverse domains: Cloud Infrastructure (AWS/GCP/Azure), CNCF projects, CVE security vulnerabilities, Electrical Engineering, Computer Hardware, and Pokemon trading card investments. Each newsletter is independently generated using AI to provide relevant, up-to-date insights without manual intervention.
features: Automated Cloud platform analysis (AWS, GCP, Azure) with provider rotation
CNCF project tracking with 6-month deduplication logic
Real-time CVE/security vulnerability analysis from NIST API
Electrical engineering and electronics components education
Computer hardware trends and specifications analysis
Pokemon trading card market investment tracking and ROI analysis
Track NYSE and TSX stocks related to a personalized list and recommend new investements based on news and trends
AI-powered content generation with natural language processing
Automated history tracking to avoid duplicate topics
aiNewsletter.conclusion: This project demonstrates advanced applications of AI across multiple domains, combining real-time API integration, market analysis, and intelligent content creation to deliver specialized insights for professionals and enthusiasts in cloud infrastructure, security, electronics, hardware, and collectibles investment.

hero.title: Hi, I'm Alexis Carbillet
hero.intro: I'm a cloud & AI engineer with a passion for building scalable systems and delightful user experiences.
hero.githubText: For the curious ones, here is my
hero.killercodaText: I also wrote different scenarios to train people for the CKA certification as well as learn how to use Linux. Here is my
hero.storeText: I am also selling digital assets such as toolkits, you can check them out on my
hero.linksDescription: Below are my different links, in the first rows are my other websites while the second has the platforms where my work is available.

experiences.title: Principal developer - DevSecOps/SRE at ARTM
description: Manage and synchronize RBAC between Azure and GCP infrastructures using Terraform and Github Actions via Identity Governance and Microsoft Entra ID.
Create a Status dashboard showing the state of each product as well as its SLI/SLO/Error budget.
Create a SAST using different opensource technologies (sonarqube, trufflehog, …) and running on Gihub Actions.
Support of Security operations via servicenow.
Create tools to help fix recurrent support issues (python, terraform and bash).

experiences.title: SRE at OVHcloud
description: Oversaw the management and uptime of 40 public cloud and VPS regions and over 40 local zones, leveraging OpenStack, Kubernetes, Terraform, Puppet, and Ansible to ensure high availability.
Facilitated multiple crisis meetings and directed team members to swiftly develop and implement effective solutions to incidents.
Developed and maintained monitoring tools using Prometheus, Thanos, Sentry, Opensearch, Grafana and others to proactively detect and resolve server issues, resulting in a 35% reduction in downtime.
Managed the creation of CI/CD workflows as well as self-healing to streamline deployment processes and improve operational efficiency.
Developed several internal tools, APIs and databases using Python, Bash and Go.
Led AI-based predictive projects for breakdown and server stock forecasting, improving capacity planning and resource allocation, including LLM on internal documentation.

experiences.title: Data Scientist at Ice Gateway GmbH
description: Developed AI-driven solutions, such as ICEassist, a voice recognition application for disabled users in public transportation, improving accessibility for hundreds of users. Available on iOS and Android.
Developed ICEsecure, a facial recognition system to detect who enters a given room based on different cameras.
Managed and drove projects the team was in charge of, as well as communicated across different parties involved.
Led customer-facing meetings, presenting AI solutions and technical products to clients.

experiences.title: Web developer at Ice Gateway GmbH
description: Led website management and optimized Search Engine Optimization (SEO) strategies to increase client traffic and online visibility.
Developed and implemented custom dashboards for clients, leveraging IoT sensor data to deliver actionable insights and enhance decision-making.
Spearheaded the creation and ongoing maintenance of the company websites, ensuring a seamless user experience and up-to-date content.
